items.name: Deep Bhatt
items.bio: Powerplay specialist known for aggressive starts and boundary hitting.

items.name: Darshan Morodiya
items.bio: Reliable middle-order presence with strong shot selection.

items.bio: Technically sound opener with the ability to anchor innings.

items.bio: Explosive finisher capable of changing the game in final overs.

items.bio: Versatile all-rounder contributing consistently in both departments.

items.name: Chintan Samosawala
items.bio: Team leader and dependable all-round performer under pressure.

items.name: Viral Rupani

items.name: Ronak Swaraj
items.bio: Provides balance to the side with flexible skillset.

items.name: Parshav Shah
